extraction.one_line_summary: HENAO Sergio defended by 2 seconds after CONTADOR Alberto attacked two Cat-1 climbs from the finish, forcing Sky to chase desperately in the closing kilometers
tactical_patterns: CONTADOR Alberto attacked with two climbs remaining despite 31-second deficit, forcing Sky into extended chase mode rather than passive defense.
HENAO Sebastián and LÓPEZ David critical domestique work prevented time loss; without both riders CONTADOR would have gained virtual lead.
HENAO Sergio positioned in sprint for fourth at finish to maximize time gains, understanding CONTADOR's 8-second bonus potential.

rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: positive: held virtual lead until final 100 meters after attacking two climbs out, demonstrating sustained climbing power Sky barely contained
rider_signals.HENAO Sergio: positive: survived maximum-pressure defense scenario with minimal domestique support, suggesting strong form under prolonged duress
rider_signals.HENAO Sebastián: positive: explicitly credited alongside LÓPEZ as decisive in preventing CONTADOR's victory through chase work on final climbs
rider_signals.LÓPEZ David: positive: paired with HENAO Sebastián as critical domestique preventing CONTADOR from gaining virtual yellow on final climbs
